defects.desc: Background color completely wrong: source has a solid black/very dark background filling the entire band; clone renders white/light gray background — the entire color scheme of the section is inverted

Entire source content (white-to-gray gradient section transitioning into a solid black band) is absent in the clone; clone shows only empty white card outlines with no background gradient, no black band, and no content
Black background band occupying the bottom ~40% of the source band is completely missing in the clone
Massive black void fills the center and bottom ~60% of the clone — background and all content within that region is absent
Bottom ~45% of right side is solid black void — role-tabs row (Product Member / Administrator / Editor / QA Tester / Owner) and lower page content entirely absent
Section background is pure white/light on clone vs dark (#0a0a0a or near-black) on source — the entire section color inverted
Text color inverted: source shows white text on dark background; clone shows dark text on white background, making the section look like an entirely different design
'durable' logo missing on the RIGHT side — slot is empty between OpenRouter and upstash equivalents

Clone renders a prominent two-column layout (text left, sign-up form right); original has centered single-column hero with the UI mockup floating at the edge/below — the dominant visual structure is wrong
Primary CTA button 'Start building for free' is missing on the RIGHT — only 'Build with agents →' text link is visible; the filled purple/dark button is absent
Trust-bar logos (Inngest, Durable, Upstrem, Consensus) replaced with different company logos (CandAI, OpenRouter, Samaya, Cartesia) — wrong brand set entirely
Three card outlines in the clone have no fill, no text, no imagery — they are blank wireframe rectangles
Left sidebar navigation panel (USER AUTHENTICATION heading, <SignUp />, <SignIn />, <UserButton />, <UserProfile />, <Waitlist /> links) entirely missing from clone
'Create your account' modal rendered only as a tiny cropped strip in the top-right corner; the full centered modal (logo, heading, Google/GitHub buttons, email/password fields, CTA) is absent
Page background is black/dark rather than the light gray-white of the source

Card grid layout broken: LEFT shows 2×2 grid (Auto-join top-left, Invitations top-right, Custom roles bottom-left, Org UI Components bottom-right); RIGHT renders 3 cards in a single row with Invitations collapsed beneath Auto-join
Large white diagonal/angled shape dominates the right side of the clone; source shows a plain dark band with no such element

All in-card UI mockup illustrations are entirely absent from clone — original shows login-form UI, device/phone mockup screens, and interface screenshots inside each feature card; clone renders cards as text-only blocks
Card grid layout broken — original presents a compact 2-column feature-card grid; clone reverts to a looser single-column or vertically-stacked list arrangement with excess spacing between cards
Authentication UI mockup (multi-card interface panel in bottom-left quadrant) is entirely missing in clone — replaced by a plain dark block with no interface elements
Fraud and Abuse Prevention feature card (right column, with honeypot sign-up detection input UI demo) is absent in clone
Person avatars/photos in the left column (three stacked portrait photos of people) are missing entirely in the clone — replaced with blank/empty space
UI mockup panel in 'Multifactor Authentication' card renders as a flat dark rectangle — source shows a detailed authentication UI with visible form fields and controls
UI mockup panel in 'Fraud and Abuse Prevention' card is a dead dark box — source shows an embedded application screenshot with UI chrome and interactive elements
UI mockup / feature cards completely missing in clone — source shows at least 3 card/panel elements below the CTA link; clone renders only a black bar
Large white/bright unstyled rectangular block appears at bottom-right of clone (bottom of the integrations icon grid area) — absent in source, breaks the dark theme entirely
Right-column code/terminal snippets lack syntax highlighting — on the LEFT the inline code blocks have colored tokens and styled backgrounds; on the RIGHT they render as plain unstyled text fragments

UI mockup/screenshot visible in source left side (dark panel with UI elements) is absent or not rendered on the right clone side — the right side shows only a dark background where a product screenshot should appear

UI mockup card on right edge: source shows a dark decorative element consistent with dark-section styling; clone shows a white/gray card panel with star icon that does not match the source's dark-themed widget

Logo strip is laid out as a flat horizontal row of equal-width columns on the RIGHT, whereas the LEFT shows a natural flowing logo strip with varied spacing and some logos partially visible/cut at the right edge — the RIGHT looks like a rigid table grid
'upstash' logo missing on the RIGHT — only text label visible without the branded icon
'Consensus' logo missing on the RIGHT — slot appears blank or text-only
The partial/cut-off logos visible on the far right of the LEFT (indicating scrollable marquee or overflow) are absent on the RIGHT which shows a static, bounded grid instead
Hero heading, body paragraph, and 'Explore all components' CTA are left-aligned in clone; original uses a fully centered text layout

Clerk sign-up UI mockup (Create your account modal with Google/GitHub buttons, email/password fields) is large and right-column-dominant in clone; in original it is barely visible as a small floating element at the upper-right edge, not a co-equal column
'Build with agents →' pill/button on RIGHT lacks the styled pill outline/background present on the LEFT
Primary CTA button 'Start building for free' missing its filled dark styling — appears as a plain/outlined button with no background fill
Nav bar right side missing 'Sign in' and 'Start building' CTA buttons — only shows 'PricingSign in Start building' as unstyled collapsed text
Nav items spacing: clone nav has excessive horizontal gaps between Products, Docs, Changelog, Company, Pricing — items spread far apart vs tightly grouped on left
Body paragraph text overflows its container on the right — line ending 'then deploy to >' is truncated/clipped with a stray '>' character visible instead of 'your own domain.'
Rounded card borders in the clone appear as plain gray strokes with no styling matching the source
'Choose an account' account-switcher panel is mis-positioned (top-right) and truncated versus source layout
Sidebar description text ('…provide account access through a dropdown menu…') floats at top of clone without structural context, detached from its sidebar card
Auto-join card: overlapping avatar-circle UI mockup missing from right side (white space where image should be)
Invitations card: 'Invite this person' UI mockup screenshot absent on right side
Custom roles and permissions card: person-avatar photo collage missing on right side
Organization UI Components card: Clerk dropdown/select UI mockup absent or reduced to empty space on right side
Bot Detection card missing from clone entirely — original has a distinct 'Bot Detection' card with illustration; it does not appear on the right side
Card visual treatment stripped — original cards have defined dark-surface backgrounds with subtle borders; clone cards appear as flat text blocks with no card chrome
Multifactor Authentication section — descriptive body text and layout card missing or collapsed in clone
Advanced Security section — body text and card missing in clone lower area
Feature card grid layout (3-column or 2-column arrangement of authentication feature blocks) is broken/absent in clone; content not distributed spatially as in source
Tab navigation row at the bottom ('Product Member', 'Administrator', 'Editor', 'QA Tester') visible in source is absent in the clone
Source shows a rounded card/modal UI with window chrome and inner content for 'Organization UI Components' panel; clone renders a flat unstyled box with no inner chrome detail
Avatar group (three overlapping circle avatars) at the top of the left source column is missing in the clone
Clone layout is compressed horizontally — three-column source layout collapses to a narrower two-column arrangement, causing content to feel cramped
Bottom portion of clone panel is a large blank/dark empty area with no content, whereas source has more populated card content extending further
Thin white horizontal line spanning the full width at the top of the clone — a border/divider artifact not present in the source

UI mockup imagery inside both cards (API Keys auth widget and MCP Server icons) is rendered far smaller in the clone — appears as tiny compressed thumbnails rather than the large, prominent interactive previews in the original
Internal card layout proportions are off — mockup content does not fill the lower portion of each card, leaving large empty dark space where the original has richly rendered demo UI
Social Sign-On provider icons (GitHub, Google, etc.) appear as indistinct small marks — source shows clearly distinct branded social-provider icon circles
Section has excessive bottom padding / black fill in clone that doesn't appear in source
Framework and integration icon tiles in clone appear smaller and more loosely spaced than source grid; icon tile sizing inconsistent with source
Icon brand logos within tiles are faint/low-contrast in clone vs clearly visible in source (e.g. the circular icon rows below the CTAs)

Dark UI mockup/browser-preview panel occupying the left half of the feature-card block — clone renders it at noticeably smaller scale and with less internal detail; interactive UI elements (window dots, tab bar) are unclear or absent
Icon grid row (bottom): all framework/integration icons are missing or invisible on clone (rendered as outlines with no fill/color vs visible on source)
Heading font size is noticeably larger on clone — 'Build with SDKs for modern frameworks' and 'Integrate with the tools you love' text is oversized relative to source

Pricing card UI mockup ('Starter' and 'Pro' cards): clone cards appear unstyled/flat — missing the green 'Get started' button fills, card border/shadow depth, and plan-name color contrast visible in the original
'Start building for free' CTA button renders as a plain green/teal pill on the RIGHT vs the darker, heavier-styled button on the LEFT
Testimonial card panel on the RIGHT loses the subtle card-border/shadow treatment visible on the LEFT, making cards feel flat and uncontained
Large black empty void occupies roughly the bottom third of the clone frame; no corresponding dark area exists in the source footer

Left sidebar navigation items (SignUp, SignIn, UserButton, UserProfile, WaitList) rendered as inline code tags with angle-bracket syntax in pink/magenta color on SRC; on CLONE they appear as plain gray text without code styling or color
Top portion of cards cropped/missing — the icon/image area at the top of each feature card is absent in the clone; source shows a dark circular icon placeholder at the top of each card
Card top-edge icons (shield, bot, lock or similar) missing entirely in clone
Black bar with small teal/blue text visible at bottom of clone band; source is entirely blank white in this region — a footer or nav element is rendering at the wrong vertical position in the clone

Clone content is vertically compressed — footer nav rows occupy noticeably less vertical height, leaving a large dark-padding void at the bottom that indicates the section was built shorter than the source band
Avatar images in testimonial cards (left column profile photos) are missing — replaced with blank placeholders
Footer background is dark/black on the RIGHT vs light gray on the LEFT — the entire footer band background color is wrong
'Clerk Components' pill label barely visible in source (white on dark) vs clearly styled in purple on clone — pill background/color treatment differs
Logo sizes and proportions differ — RIGHT renders logos noticeably smaller and uniform; LEFT has naturally sized brand assets at varied scales
Background color of logo strip on RIGHT appears white/very light with visible column dividers; LEFT has a seamless light background with no divider lines
Column width proportions differ: clone splits roughly 50/50 text+form; original text block spans the full centered width with no competing column
Sub-heading body text on RIGHT appears slightly smaller/lighter than LEFT, reducing visual weight
Overall vertical spacing below headline is tighter on RIGHT, compressing the CTA row upward
'Build with agents →' secondary link rendered as a plain text link rather than styled pill/button
Hero heading line-break differs: LEFT wraps 'More than authentication, / Complete User Management' across 2 lines cleanly; RIGHT wraps to 3 lines pushing 'Management' to its own line
'Sign in' and 'Start building' CTA area: in clone 'PricingSign in' appears run together without spacing, suggesting a missing separator or layout gap
Background decorative dot-grid pattern visible on source (faint dots across the hero area) is absent on the clone — clone shows plain white
Minor horizontal spacing difference: right-side body text block appears slightly narrower, causing different line-wrap cadence vs. source
B2B Authentication and Billing accordion rows render without the sidebar wrapper/indentation, appearing as raw floating rows
Card order differs from source: RIGHT leads with 'Custom roles and permissions' rather than 'Auto-join'
Card ordering differs — 'Fraud and Abuse Prevention' appears as the second entry on right but is not in equivalent position on left, disrupting reading-order correspondence
Section-level spacing significantly larger on clone, making the band feel half-populated compared to the denser original grid
Explore user authentication CTA appears unstyled/lacks visible button treatment compared to source
'Invite this person' button in clone lacks the envelope icon present in the source version
Clerk dropdown pill/button in source has a styled chevron and subtle border; clone version appears flatter and less styled
Faint scattered dot/glyph elements visible in the source dark background are absent in the clone, which renders as pure black
Bottom wave/curved white divider shape differs — original has a smooth scalloped wave transition; clone shows a more angular, flat-edged white block
Card border/container appears to extend slightly differently in height, making cards look taller and emptier in the clone
'Accept Invite' styled button element visible inside source mockup panel is absent in clone
Bento card proportions differ — source has varied-height cards with a more dynamic grid; clone cards appear more uniformly sized and compressed
Small feature icons at the bottom of certain cards (visible on source) appear missing or reduced to invisible dots on clone
Background color mismatch: source is light gray (#f5f5f5-ish), clone renders as white
'B2B Authentication' pill/label above heading appears more prominently styled (violet link) in source; clone renders it smaller/lighter
'All frameworks →' and 'All Integrations →' CTA links appear lighter/less styled in clone vs source
Feature card grid in dark section — card proportions and internal padding differ from source; cards appear more compressed vertically in clone
'Advanced security' section label/pill (top-right of dark block) is not visible in clone at the same position as source
White B2B Authentication section in clone appears horizontally narrower / offset left compared to source, causing layout misalignment at the section boundary
Body copy text below headings appears larger/heavier than source, reducing the subtle secondary hierarchy
'All frameworks' and 'All integrations' CTA links appear to lack the arrow/chevron icon visible on source
Horizontal spacing between the two columns is wider on clone, reducing density match to source
Bottom angled/diagonal decorative band (dark chevron/divider shape at bottom of source) is cut off or absent on clone
Hero section left-side background: original has a subtle warm off-white/cream tinted background behind the text column; clone renders plain white, losing section depth
Navigation bar top-right icon cluster (profile/avatar pill): present in original, appears absent or unstyled in clone
Billing brand wordmark color: original shows a distinct blue/teal accent color on the 'Billing' product label top-left; clone renders it in a less saturated or default color

Vertical spacing between nav link rows is noticeably tighter in the clone, making the footer feel compressed compared to the airier source layout
